center.title: Self-service recovery
center.subtitle: Use guided repair actions to resolve blocked orders, payments, shifts, Z-reports, and printer issues without leaving the POS.
center.needsAttentionSubtitle: Blocking issues require user action before sync can return to a clean state.
center.noBlockingIssues: No blocking issues are currently visible.
center.recoveringSubtitle: These issues are being retried or can be nudged safely without destructive cleanup.
center.noRecoveringIssues: No active automatic recovery is in progress.
center.recentActionsSubtitle: Every repair attempt is audited locally so staff can see what was tried and what succeeded.
center.noRecentActions: No recovery actions have been recorded yet.

messages.actionFailed: {{action}} failed. Review the issue details and try again.
messages.orderNotFound: The requested order {{orderNumber}} could not be found locally.

genericSyncBlocker.title: Sync item needs review
genericSyncBlocker.summary: A local sync item is still blocked and needs attention before the terminal can fully recover.
genericSyncBlocker.guidance: Use the available actions to retry, requeue, or open the related entity and finish the repair.

paymentAdjustmentOrderNotFound.title: Return or void cannot find its order
paymentAdjustmentOrderNotFound.summary: The local financial adjustment for {{orderNumber}} points to an order that is no longer available on the server.
paymentAdjustmentOrderNotFound.guidance: Open the order to confirm its history. If the order cannot be recovered, discard the local adjustment from this terminal.

paymentAdjustmentMissingParent.title: Adjustment is waiting for its parent payment
paymentAdjustmentMissingParent.summary: The financial adjustment for {{orderNumber}} cannot sync until the original payment is synced first.
paymentAdjustmentMissingParent.guidance: Retry sync or open the order settlement flow and confirm that the original payment exists and is completed.

paymentAdjustmentMissingCanonicalParent.title: Adjustment is waiting for a canonical payment record
paymentAdjustmentMissingCanonicalParent.summary: The terminal found the parent payment for {{orderNumber}}, but it still does not have a valid canonical remote payment ID.
paymentAdjustmentMissingCanonicalParent.guidance: Retry sync first. If the issue stays blocked, open the order settlement flow and fix the payment chain before running Z-report.

paymentAdjustmentAmbiguousParent.title: Adjustment has more than one possible parent payment
paymentAdjustmentAmbiguousParent.summary: The terminal repaired multiple payment records for {{orderNumber}} and cannot safely decide which one owns this adjustment.
paymentAdjustmentAmbiguousParent.guidance: Open the order settlement flow, keep the correct payment, and remove or void the duplicate lineage before retrying sync.

orderSyncBlocked.title: Order sync is blocked
orderSyncBlocked.summary: The order {{orderNumber}} is still waiting in the sync queue and is blocking dependent work.
orderSyncBlocked.guidance: Open the order, verify the latest data, and retry or requeue the sync item from this screen.

shiftSyncConflict.title: Shift sync conflict
shiftSyncConflict.summary: This shift cannot sync because the server still sees another unresolved active shift for the same staff member.
shiftSyncConflict.guidance: Open shift repair to close or repair the conflicting shift before continuing with other sync work.

zReportSubmissionFailed.title: Z-report submission failed
zReportSubmissionFailed.summary: The local Z-report for {{reportDate}} could not be submitted successfully.
zReportSubmissionFailed.guidance: Open the Z-report for the affected business day, review the blocking items, and retry or discard the local draft only if recovery is impossible.

invalidOrderReference.title: Order references items that no longer exist
invalidOrderReference.summary: A local order contains menu references that no longer match the cached catalog.
invalidOrderReference.guidance: Open the order to review the invalid items. If the order is no longer recoverable, delete the failed local order after confirming.

printerNotConfigured.title: Receipt printer is not configured
printerNotConfigured.summary: The terminal cannot print operational documents because no suitable receipt printer profile is configured.
printerNotConfigured.guidance: Open printer setup, configure a receipt printer, and retry the failed print job afterwards.

actions.confirmMessage: This action changes local recovery data for the selected issue.

forceCloseShift.label: Force-close stuck shift
forceCloseShift.confirmMessage: This marks the stuck shift as abandoned and zeroes out cash fields. The action is logged and cannot be undone.
forceCloseShift.confirmCheckbox: I understand that this permanently closes the shift with zeroed financial data.

discardLocalAdjustment.label: Discard local adjustment
discardLocalAdjustment.confirmMessage: This removes the local-only financial adjustment linked to {{orderNumber}} from this terminal. The action is audited and cannot be undone without restoring a local backup.
discardLocalAdjustment.confirmCheckbox: I understand that this deletes the local adjustment from this terminal only.

discardLocalZReport.label: Discard local Z-report draft
discardLocalZReport.confirmMessage: This removes the local Z-report draft for {{reportDate}} from this terminal. Use this only when the report cannot be recovered safely.
discardLocalZReport.confirmCheckbox: I understand that this deletes the local Z-report draft from this terminal only.

deleteLocalFailedOrder.label: Delete failed local order
deleteLocalFailedOrder.confirmMessage: This permanently removes the failed local order {{orderNumber}} and its dependent local sync rows from this terminal.
deleteLocalFailedOrder.confirmCheckbox: I understand that this deletes the local failed order and cannot be undone without a backup.
